creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
Hi,

On Thu, 18 Oct 2007 21:40:46 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Please note that PR ports/117305 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

We have a new net/sipp snapshot now - see ports/117463 (anyway
'benchmark' category for the port is a good idea).

-- 
/tut
